jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
